To Šalim-Aššur from Iddin-abum, Itūr-ilī, Inah-ilī, Ennam-Aššur and Ali-ahum: Itūr-ilī, Ennam-Aššur and Ali-ahum said: "The silver has brought me the silver and the silver has brought me the silver and send me the silver to Itūr-ilī, Ennam-Aššur and Ali-ahum:
